summary: Successfully tested all three new Bulk Category Editor features: 1) Hidden SEO Keywords text area with Auto-Generate button, 2) Auto-detect Large Format from size checkbox (tiles ≥60×60cm), 3) Main Category and Sub-Categories saving. All features working correctly - UI elements present, data saves to database, Auto-detect Large Format correctly tagged LP-6611 (60x60cm) as Large Format while LP-3611 (30x60cm) was not tagged.
critical_code_review_comments: Hidden SEO Keywords implementation at lines 5966-6002 in SupplierProducts.js is clean with proper state management
Auto-detect Large Format logic at lines 1640-1658 correctly identifies tiles ≥60×60cm
Backend bulk-update-unified endpoint properly handles main_category and sub_categories as documented at line 9653-9654
Backend bulk-description endpoint handles hidden_seo_keywords and generate_hidden_seo at lines 5250-5259
The toast message 'Updated 2 products (1 tagged as Large Format)' confirms Auto-detect feature is working as expected
seed_data_creation: Updated LP-3611 and LP-6611 with main_category='Wall & Floor Tiles', sub_categories=['Stone Effect'] (LP-6611 also got 'Large Format' auto-added), hidden_seo_keywords set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new Bulk Category Editor features verified: 1) Hidden SEO Keywords text area appears in Description & SEO section and saves via bulk-description endpoint, 2) Auto-detect Large Format checkbox in Sub-Categories section correctly tags 60x60cm tiles as Large Format, 3) Main Category and Sub-Categories save correctly via bulk-update-unified endpoint. All data persists in supplier_products collection. Test products: LP-3611 (30x60cm small), LP-6611 (60x60cm large format).

hidden_seo_keywords.ui_element: textarea in Description & SEO section with placeholder for manual entry

main_category.ui_element: Button group with options: Wall & Floor Tiles, Wall Tiles Only, Floor Tiles Only, etc.

sub_categories.ui_element: Multi-select button group with options: Wall Tiles, Floor Tiles, Large Format, etc.

auto_detect_large_format.logic: Tiles ≥60×60cm automatically get 'Large Format' added to sub_categories
auto_detect_large_format.toast_confirmation: Updated 2 products (1 tagged as Large Format)
